title: Descent for Toric Varieties — The Natural Home

analysis.object: T771: Descent for Toric Varieties — The Natural Home depth analysis

toric_variety.description: Toric variety X_sigma: defined by fan sigma in R^n

tropicalization_toric.description: trop(X_sigma) = the fan sigma itself -- trivially
tropicalization_toric.reason: Tropicalization of toric is toric skeleton

toric_cycles.description: Toric cycles = orbit closures V(sigma) -- EML-0 constructive

tropical_toric_cycles.description: Tropical cycles in trop(X_sigma) = subfans -- combinatorial

toric_formal_model.description: Toric varieties are defined over Z -- formal model over any valuation ring trivially

t771_theorem.description: T771: Toric descent is trivially true. trop(X_sigma) = sigma; tropical cycles = subfans = orbit closures = algebraic cycles. The dictionary is perfect for toric. T771.
t771_theorem.reason: Trivial case but important: confirms mechanism works

analysis.theorem: T771: Descent for Toric Varieties — The Natural Home (S1050).
